metadata.criteria: Low LDL cholesterol impact, low glycemic index, low sodium, low saturated fat. Suitable for borderline high LDL, hypertension, fatty liver.

vegetables.health_rationale: Fresh vegetables are universally beneficial for LDL, hypertension, and fatty liver. Leafy greens, cruciferous vegetables, and mushrooms are particularly valuable. Zero saturated fat, low sodium, high fiber, rich in antioxidants.

items.name: Beet Loose 2 lb
items.health_note: Excellent for blood pressure - contains nitrates that dilate blood vessels. High in fiber and folate.

items.name: Shanghai Bok Choy 2 lb
items.health_note: Leafy green rich in calcium, vitamin K, and antioxidants. Very low calorie.

items.name: Cilantro 1 bunch
items.health_note: Contains compounds that may help lower blood sugar and cholesterol. Rich in antioxidants.

items.name: Green Cabbage 1 count
items.health_note: Cruciferous vegetable excellent for liver detoxification. High in vitamin C and fiber.

items.name: Japanese White Daikon Radish 1.6-2 lb
items.health_note: Very low calorie, high in vitamin C. Digestive enzyme support.

items.name: Gai Lan Mieu 1 lb
items.health_note: Chinese broccoli variety - cruciferous vegetable, excellent for liver health and cholesterol.

items.name: King Oyster Mushrooms 1 lb
items.health_note: Beta-glucans in mushrooms actively lower LDL cholesterol. Excellent meat substitute.

items.name: Shimeji Brown Mushroom 150 g
items.health_note: Rich in beta-glucans, ergothioneine. Supports immune function and heart health.

items.name: Enoki Mushrooms 200 g
items.health_note: Very low calorie, high in B vitamins. Contains compounds that support liver function.

items.name: Maitake Mushrooms 150 g
items.health_note: Maitake has strong evidence for lowering blood sugar and cholesterol. Anti-inflammatory.

items.name: Soy Bean Sprouts 1 lb
items.health_note: Plant protein, very low calorie, high in vitamin C and folate.

items.name: Yu Choy Mieu 0.95-1 lb
items.health_note: Nutrient-dense leafy green. Rich in calcium, iron, and vitamins A and C.

items.name: Tong Ho (Chrysanthemum Greens) 1 lb
items.health_note: Traditional medicinal green. Anti-inflammatory, supports liver and digestive health.

items.name: Chinese Broccoli 2 lb
items.health_note: Cruciferous vegetable - sulforaphane supports liver detox. High in calcium and iron.

items.name: Taiwan Cabbage 2.5-3.3 lb
items.health_note: Cruciferous, tender variety. Excellent source of vitamin C and fiber.

items.name: Baby Napa Cabbage 2-2.5 lb
items.health_note: Mild, versatile cruciferous vegetable. Low calorie, good for soups and stir-fry.

items.name: A Choy Sum 2.3-2.6 lb
items.health_note: Leafy green flowering cabbage. Rich in folate, vitamin C, and calcium.

items.name: Chinese Celery 1.95-2.05 lb
items.health_note: Contains phthalides which may help lower blood pressure. Very low calorie.

items.name: Snow Pea Tips 1 lb
items.health_note: Tender leafy shoots, excellent fiber and vitamin C. Very low calorie.

items.name: Snow Peas 1 lb
items.health_note: Legume vegetable - high fiber, plant protein, very low GI.

items.name: Long Bok Choy 2 lb
items.health_note: Calcium-rich leafy green. Excellent anti-inflammatory properties.

items.name: Taiwan Spinach 0.95-1.05 lb
items.health_note: High in nitrates (blood pressure), folate, iron, and vitamin K.

items.name: Green Leaf Lettuce Bunch 1 count
items.health_note: Very low calorie base for salads. Contains lactucarium, mild sedative.

items.name: Chinese Cauliflower 2.3-2.5 lb
items.health_note: Cruciferous, excellent for liver detoxification. Rich in vitamin C.

items.name: Fuzzy Squash 3-3.5 lb
items.health_note: Very low calorie, hydrating. Traditional Chinese medicine cooling food.

items.name: Opo Squash 2.4-2.8 lb
items.health_note: Extremely low calorie (15 cal/cup), hydrating. Good for weight management.

items.name: Sweet Pepper 8 oz
items.health_note: Very high in vitamin C and antioxidants. Supports immune function.

items.name: Green Papaya 1 count
items.health_note: Contains papain enzyme for digestion. Low GI, rich in vitamins.

items.name: Organic Fresh Ginger 8 oz
items.health_note: Powerful anti-inflammatory. Helps lower blood sugar and cholesterol.

items.name: Lemon Grass 1 lb
items.health_note: Anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial. May help reduce cholesterol.

items.name: Black Wood Ear Mushroom Fungus 6 oz
items.health_note: Traditional blood health food. Contains polysaccharides that support cardiovascular health.

items.name: Hokto Organic White Beech Mushroom 100 g
items.health_note: Organic mushroom, rich in antioxidants and beta-glucans.

items.name: Winter Bamboo Shoots 1-1.3 lb
items.health_note: High in fiber, very low calorie. Contains phytosterols that block cholesterol absorption.

items.name: Baby French Carrot 1 bunch
items.health_note: Rich in beta-carotene, supports liver health. Moderate GI.

fruits.health_rationale: Selected for lower glycemic index. Berries and citrus are particularly beneficial - high in antioxidants, vitamin C, and fiber while being lower GI. Avoid overconsuming high-sugar tropical fruits.

items.name: Blueberry 6 oz
items.health_note: Exceptional for heart health. Anthocyanins lower LDL and blood pressure. Low GI.

items.name: Blackberries 6 oz
items.health_note: Very low GI, extremely high in fiber and antioxidants.

items.name: Guava 2.8-3.2 lb
items.health_note: Low GI, exceptionally high in vitamin C. May help lower blood pressure and cholesterol.

items.name: Lemon 1 Bag 2 lb
items.health_note: Very low GI. Vitamin C, citric acid aids mineral absorption. Alkalizing effect.

items.name: Limes 5 count
items.health_note: Very low GI. Flavonoids support liver function.

items.name: Key Limes 1 lb
items.health_note: Rich in antioxidants and vitamin C. Very low GI.

items.name: Asian Honey Pears 3ct 2.5-2.75 lb
items.health_note: Moderate GI, good fiber. Asian pears are hydrating and aid digestion.

items.name: Golden Berry with Husk 3 oz
items.health_note: Low GI superfruit. High in withanolides (anti-inflammatory), vitamin C, and fiber.

items.name: Green Dragon Apples 2 lb
items.health_note: Green apples are lower GI than sweet varieties. Pectin fiber helps lower cholesterol.

items.name: Honey Crisp Apples 2.8-3.2 lb
items.health_note: Moderate GI. Pectin fiber binds cholesterol. Good source of quercetin.

items.name: Rockit Apples 3 lb
items.health_note: Miniature apples - built-in portion control. Good fiber content.

items.name: Brown Coconut 1 count
items.health_note: Coconut water is low GI, rich in potassium (blood pressure). Use meat sparingly (saturated fat).

items.name: Ready-To-Drink Young Coconut 1 count
items.health_note: Natural electrolyte drink. High potassium supports blood pressure regulation.

items.name: Korean Melon 4-4.5 lb
items.health_note: Low calorie, moderate GI. High water content, good for hydration.

items.name: Red Dragon Fruit 2.7-3.3 lb
items.health_note: Rich in betalains (antioxidant), prebiotic fiber. Supports gut and liver health.

items.name: White Dragon Fruit, 1 Box 10 lb
items.health_note: High in prebiotic fiber, vitamin C, and magnesium. Moderate GI.

items.name: Red Plum 2 lb
items.health_note: Low GI stone fruit. Rich in anthocyanins and polyphenols.

items.name: Kumquat 8 oz
items.health_note: Eat whole with peel - very high in fiber and flavonoids. Low GI.

items.name: Pepino Melon 1 count
items.health_note: Very low calorie, low GI. Good source of vitamin C.

tofu_and_vegan.health_rationale: Soy protein actively lowers LDL cholesterol (FDA approved health claim: 25g soy protein/day). Tofu is low in saturated fat, zero cholesterol, and excellent for fatty liver. Shirataki/konjac noodles are essentially zero calorie.

items.name: Sansui Silken Tofu 454 g
items.health_note: Silken tofu - versatile for soups, smoothies, desserts. Complete soy protein.

items.name: Ichiban Tofu Medium Firm 14 oz
items.health_note: Good for stir-fry. Soy isoflavones support cardiovascular health.

items.name: Ichiban Tofu Soft 14 oz
items.health_note: Soft tofu for soups and steaming. Low calorie, high protein.

items.name: Nature's Soy Soft Tofu 16 oz
items.health_note: Quality soft tofu. Soy protein lowers LDL by 3-5%.

items.name: Havista Shirataki Noodles 500 g
items.health_note: Zero calorie, zero GI. Glucomannan fiber lowers cholesterol and supports weight loss. Excellent pasta substitute.

items.name: Zuming Dried Bean Cake 500 g
items.health_note: Concentrated soy protein. Great stir-fry ingredient.

items.name: Zuming Soft Beancurd Snack 500 g
items.health_note: Soy-based snack. Good source of plant protein and calcium.

items.name: Watson Dried Tofu Sheets 250 g
items.health_note: Versatile soy product for wraps and stir-fry. High protein.

items.name: Feitian Potato Noodle (Round) 280 g
items.health_note: Potato starch noodle - gluten-free alternative for hot pot.

items.name: Nature's Soy Mapo Tofu (Mild) 16.8 oz
items.health_note: Ready-to-eat tofu dish. Check sodium on label - convenient protein source.

items.name: Mandarin Soyfoods Japanese Egg Tofu 245 g
items.health_note: Silky smooth tofu, good for steaming. Low calorie.

seafood.health_rationale: Omega-3 fatty acids in fish actively lower triglycerides and inflammation. Fish is the primary dietary source of EPA/DHA. Lean white fish is extremely low in saturated fat. Aim for 2+ servings per week.

items.name: Swai Fillets, Frozen 2 lb
items.health_note: Very lean white fish. Extremely low saturated fat, good protein source.

items.name: TSF Barramundi Whole Cleaned 500-550 g
items.health_note: Lean white fish with mild flavor. Good source of omega-3 and protein.

items.name: Yellowfin Tuna Sashimi, Frozen 9-12 oz
items.health_note: Rich in omega-3 fatty acids and selenium. Very lean protein. Limit to 2x/week (mercury).

items.name: New Zealand Half Shell Greenshell Mussels 2 lb
items.health_note: Exceptionally rich in omega-3, zinc, selenium, and B12. Anti-inflammatory.

items.name: New Port Whole Cooked Steamer Clams, Frozen 1 lb
items.health_note: Excellent source of iron, B12, and omega-3. Very low in saturated fat.

items.name: Clearwater Arctic Surf Clams, Frozen 400 g
items.health_note: High-quality protein, rich in iron and B12. Low fat.

items.name: Wild Argentine Red Shrimp, Peeled and Deveined 16-30ct, Frozen 1 lb
items.health_note: Wild-caught, lean protein. Rich in astaxanthin antioxidant. Low in saturated fat.

items.name: Chaimi Light Salted Chilean Coho Salmon Slices, Frozen 1 lb
items.health_note: Salmon is the gold standard for omega-3. Note: lightly salted - rinse before cooking if hypertensive.

items.name: Whole Tilapia Gilled, Gutted, Scaled, Frozen 2 lb
items.health_note: Very lean white fish. Affordable protein source, very low saturated fat.

items.name: Evergreen Food Snakehead Fish Slices Frozen 250 g
items.health_note: Lean freshwater fish. Traditional healing food in Chinese medicine - supports liver recovery.

items.name: Talassa Wild Caught Whole Round Silver Pomfret 4-5pcs, Frozen 500 g
items.health_note: Wild-caught lean fish. Good source of protein with moderate omega-3.

items.name: Skinless Tilapia Fillet, Individually Vacuum Packed, Frozen 2 lb
items.health_note: Convenient individually packed fillets. Very lean, low calorie protein.

meat_lean_options.health_rationale: Meat should be consumed in moderation for these conditions. Only the leanest cuts are included. Skinless poultry and pork tenderloin are the best options. Avoid processed meats, sausages, and high-fat cuts entirely.

items.name: Boneless & Skinless Chicken Thighs Frozen 1.5 lb
items.health_note: Skinless chicken is lean protein. Thighs have slightly more fat than breast but more flavor and iron.

items.name: Pork Tenderloin, Frozen 2-2.5 lb
items.health_note: Leanest cut of pork - comparable to chicken breast in fat content. Excellent protein.

items.name: The Original B&B Stewing Hen, Frozen 1.5-2.5 lb
items.health_note: For making bone broth - rich in collagen and minerals. Remove skin and fat before eating.

frozen_healthy_picks.health_rationale: Most frozen items are processed and high in sodium. These selections focus on frozen vegetables, simple preparations, and items with minimal processing.

items.name: Spring Home Spring Roll Wrappers 8" 25pc, Frozen 340 g
items.health_note: Use for fresh (not fried) spring rolls packed with vegetables. Very low calorie wrapper.

items.name: Wei-Chuan Flat Beans, Frozen 1 lb
items.health_note: Frozen vegetables retain nutrients. Convenient fiber and vitamin source.

items.name: October Wing Green Broad Bean Skinless, Frozen 454 g
items.health_note: Broad beans are excellent - high fiber, plant protein, folate. Great for cholesterol.

items.name: Dianfa Chiba Tofu Frozen 400 g
items.health_note: Frozen tofu with a firmer texture. Good plant protein option for hot pot.

dry_goods.health_rationale: Whole grains, beans, and legumes are foundational for heart health. Soluble fiber in oats and barley directly lowers LDL. Beans provide plant protein that replaces animal protein. Dried mushrooms retain their cholesterol-lowering beta-glucans.

items.name: Chimes Garden Organic Pearl Barley 16 oz
items.health_note: Barley has the highest beta-glucan content - directly proven to lower LDL cholesterol. Low GI.

items.name: Chimes Garden Organic Soybeans 16 oz
items.health_note: Whole soybeans - cook for edamame or soups. 25g soy protein/day lowers LDL (FDA claim).

items.name: Chimes Garden Organic Mung Beans 16 oz
items.health_note: Low GI, high in potassium (blood pressure), folate, and fiber. Traditional cooling food.

items.name: GongHe NingXia Goji Berry 227 g
items.health_note: Antioxidant superfood. Contains betaine which supports liver function and fat metabolism.

items.name: Dried Lion's Mane 6 oz
items.health_note: Medicinal mushroom - studies show it may reduce blood lipids and support liver health.

items.name: Longkou Vermicelli (Bean Thread) 272 g
items.health_note: Made from mung beans - lower GI than wheat noodles. Good fiber content.

items.name: Pure Mung Bean Thread Noodles 180 g
items.health_note: Pure mung bean starch - low GI noodle alternative.

items.name: Kokuho Calrose Rice California Premium 15 lb
items.health_note: Staple rice. Moderate GI - pair with vegetables and protein to lower glycemic impact.

items.name: Big Green Organic Black Beans 16 oz
items.health_note: Black beans are exceptionally heart-healthy. High in anthocyanins, fiber, and plant protein.

items.name: Big Green Spring Farm Organic Millet 14 oz
items.health_note: Whole grain - higher in protein and fiber than white rice. Lower GI than rice.

items.name: Organic Barley Kernels 12 oz
items.health_note: Whole barley - highest beta-glucan content of any grain. Proven to lower LDL.

items.name: Hunsty Red Beans 12 oz
items.health_note: Adzuki beans - high in potassium (blood pressure), fiber, and plant protein. Traditional kidney/liver tonic.

items.name: Si Hong Food Pitted Dates, Dried 1000 g
items.health_note: In moderation - rich in potassium, magnesium, and iron. Traditional blood-building food. Higher GI.

items.name: Dried Monk Fruit Luo Han Guo 2 count
items.health_note: Zero-calorie natural sweetener. Zero GI impact. Excellent sugar substitute.

items.name: Sailing Zhangzhou Dried Snow White Fungus 12 oz
items.health_note: Traditional longevity food. Polysaccharides support immune function and skin health. Low calorie.

items.name: Shuang Li Dried Skin Peanuts 12 oz
items.health_note: Peanuts are rich in monounsaturated fat (heart-healthy). Good plant protein. Eat in moderation.

instant_and_prepackaged.health_rationale: Most instant foods are very high in sodium - a major concern for hypertension. These picks are the healthiest options found in the category. Always check sodium content on labels.

items.name: Yuanxian Konjac Jelly Noodle 268 g
items.health_note: Konjac/glucomannan noodle - essentially zero calorie, zero GI. Excellent for weight management.

items.name: YINLU Longan and Lotus Seed Congee 360 g
items.health_note: Traditional congee - easy to digest. Longan and lotus seed are traditional nourishing ingredients.

items.name: DaliGroup Black Rice Purple Potato Mixed Congee 360 g
items.health_note: Black rice is rich in anthocyanins (antioxidant). Purple potato has lower GI than regular potato.

items.name: Subo Seaweed Egg Soup 32 g
items.health_note: Seaweed is rich in iodine and minerals. Lower sodium than most instant soups.

items.name: Xiangyuan Roasted Black Sesame Powder 250 g
items.health_note: Black sesame is rich in calcium, iron, and healthy fats. Traditional kidney/liver tonic in TCM.

beverages.health_rationale: Most Asian beverages are high in sugar. These picks focus on unsweetened options, herbal teas, and plant-based milks. Unsweetened tea and soy milk are the best daily choices.

items.name: Nature's Soy Unsweetened Soy Milk 1890 ml
items.health_note: Unsweetened soy milk - plant protein that lowers LDL. No added sugar, low GI.

items.name: Zu Ming Organic Soy Milk 1000 ml
items.health_note: Organic soy milk. Soy isoflavones support heart health.

items.name: Chaokoh Coconut Water 1000 ml
items.health_note: Natural electrolytes, rich in potassium. No added sugar. Supports blood pressure regulation.

items.name: Wei Chuan 100% Coconut Water 500 ml
items.health_note: Pure coconut water - natural potassium source for blood pressure support.

items.name: Vita Chrysanthemum Tea 250 ml x 6 pack
items.health_note: Traditional cooling herbal tea. Chrysanthemum has anti-inflammatory and liver-protective properties.

items.name: Genki Forest Sparkling Water, White Peach Flavor 330 ml x 6
items.health_note: Zero sugar, zero calorie sparkling water. Good soda substitute.

items.name: Genki Forest Sparkling Water, Grape Delight Flavor 330 ml x 6
items.health_note: Zero sugar sparkling water variety. Satisfies carbonation craving without sugar.

items.name: Oatly Oat Milk, Original Flavor 64 fl.oz
items.health_note: Oat-based milk - oat beta-glucans help lower cholesterol. No saturated fat.

items.name: Califia Farms Unsweetened Almond Milk 48 fl.oz
items.health_note: Unsweetened, very low calorie. No saturated fat. Good vitamin E source.

items.name: Nongfu Spring Eastern Leaves Jasmine Tea 500 ml
items.health_note: Unsweetened jasmine green tea. Catechins in green tea support cardiovascular health.

snacks.health_rationale: Snacking is where most people fall off track. These picks focus on seaweed (iodine, minerals), konjac (zero calorie), nuts/seeds in moderation (unsaturated fats), and naturally dried fruits.

items.name: Orihiro Konjac Jelly 0 Calories, Kyoho Grape, Muscat & Mango Flavor 24pcs 432 g
items.health_note: Zero calorie snack! Konjac/glucomannan fiber is filling and supports digestion.

items.name: Kimnori Organic Sushi Nori Roasted Seaweed Sheets 1 each
items.health_note: Organic seaweed - rich in iodine, minerals, and fucoxanthin (supports fat metabolism).

items.name: ChaCha Roasted Sunflower Seeds Original Flavor 250 g
items.health_note: Rich in vitamin E and phytosterols (block cholesterol absorption). Moderate portions.

items.name: Big Green Organic Hawthorn Berry Chips 100 g
items.health_note: Hawthorn berry is a traditional heart tonic. Contains flavonoids that support cardiovascular health.

items.name: Pacific Soda Crackers, Sesame Flavor 400 g
items.health_note: Sesame adds healthy fats. Lower sodium than many cracker options. Check label.

items.name: LYFEN Kelp Crisp Bamboo Shoots 160 g
items.health_note: Kelp is rich in iodine and alginates that support metabolism. Bamboo shoots add fiber.

items.name: Taokaenoi Big Roll Classic Grilled Seaweed 9pc 27 g
items.health_note: Low calorie seaweed snack. Rich in minerals and iodine. Check sodium on label.

items.name: Weilong Spicy Konjac Snack 20pcs 360 g
items.health_note: Konjac-based snack - very low calorie. Note: may have moderate sodium from seasoning.

dairy_and_eggs.health_rationale: Low-fat/non-fat dairy and plant-based alternatives are best for high LDL. Greek yogurt provides probiotics for gut health. Eggs are fine in moderation (dietary cholesterol has less impact than saturated fat). Plant-based milks avoid saturated fat entirely.

items.name: Chobani Greek Yogurt Non Fat Plain 32 oz
items.health_note: Non-fat Greek yogurt - high protein, probiotics, zero fat. Excellent for gut health.

items.name: Stonyfield Organic Probiotic Plain Whole Milk Yogurt 32 oz
items.health_note: Organic with live cultures. Probiotics support gut-liver axis health.

items.name: Greek Gods Plain Traditional Greek Yogurt 24 oz
items.health_note: Plain yogurt - no added sugar. Good calcium and protein source.

items.name: Yakult Light Nonfat Probiotic Drink 2.7 fl.oz x 5
items.health_note: Light version - fewer calories. Probiotics support immune and gut health.

items.name: Beijing Yogurt Low Fat Yogurt 6 oz x 6
items.health_note: Low fat yogurt - reduces saturated fat intake while maintaining calcium and probiotics.

items.name: Vital Farms Organic Pasture-Raised Eggs 18 ct
items.health_note: Pasture-raised eggs have more omega-3. 1-2 eggs/day is fine - dietary cholesterol has minimal LDL impact.

items.name: Quail Eggs 15ct
items.health_note: Small portions, rich in B12 and selenium. Traditional nourishing food.

items.name: Lactaid Lactose-Free 2% Reduced Fat Milk 63.9 fl.oz
items.health_note: Reduced fat, lactose-free. Good calcium source with less saturated fat than whole milk.

seasoning_healthy_picks.health_rationale: Seasonings are critical - they determine sodium intake. Use reduced-sodium soy sauce, vinegar (acetic acid helps blood sugar), and spices/herbs instead of salt. Avoid heavy sauces.

items.name: Lee Kum Kee Sodium Reduced Seasoning Soy Sauce 16.9 g
items.health_note: ESSENTIAL - reduced sodium soy sauce. Switch from regular soy sauce to cut sodium significantly.

items.name: Hengshun Zhenjiang Vinegar 18.6 fl.oz
items.health_note: Vinegar helps lower blood sugar after meals. Use liberally as a condiment - zero calories.

items.name: Kong Yen Rice Vinegar 20.2 fl.oz
items.health_note: Milder vinegar for dressings and cooking. Acetic acid supports blood sugar control.

items.name: White Pepper Powder 32 g
items.health_note: Adds flavor without sodium. Piperine enhances nutrient absorption.

items.name: Tomax Five Spice Powder 20 g
items.health_note: Star anise, cloves, cinnamon, Sichuan pepper, fennel - all spices with anti-inflammatory properties. Zero sodium.

items.name: Kadoya Roasted Sesame Oil 163 ml
items.health_note: Sesame oil has sesamol - a powerful antioxidant. Use as finishing oil (small amounts). Monounsaturated fat.

items.name: Arowana Brand Golden Ratio Vegetable Cooking Oil 900 ml
items.health_note: Blended vegetable oil - lower in saturated fat than lard or palm oil.

items.name: Haidilao Hot Pot Mushroom Soup Base 150 g
items.health_note: Mushroom-based soup base - lighter than spicy or beef tallow versions. Still check sodium.

items.name: Haidilao Hot Pot Tomato Soup Base 200 g
items.health_note: Tomato-based - lycopene is a powerful antioxidant for heart health. Lighter than oil-based bases.

items.name: Gold-Plum Chinkiang Vinegar 550 ml
items.health_note: Black vinegar - traditional condiment. Acetic acid helps blood sugar regulation.
